# Commercial pilot record

Status: draft template; completion never implies production approval.

## Scope and authority

- Pilot identifier, dates, sites, hardware revisions, signed software/model/policy digests
- Intended use, excluded uses, operating envelope, enabled promoted capabilities
- Jurisdictions and named legal/regulatory/privacy approvals with immutable references
- Ethics/consent authority where human research or validation occurs
- Installer/operator training and participant information/withdrawal process

## Preregistered measures

- Installation first-pass success and time-to-qualification
- Valid-window coverage and abstention by declared condition
- Reliability, restart, fault, update, rollback, recovery, and support incidents
- Support time/cost, replacement/return rate, usability/accessibility findings
- Privacy/consent complaints and deletion completion
- Willingness-to-pay method and sampling limits
- Fixed success/failure thresholds and stopping/suspension rules

## Results

Record denominators, missingness, exclusions, confidence intervals, negative/null outcomes, site and hardware stratification, and immutable raw/report digests. Do not change scientific, reliability, safety, or commercial thresholds after observing results.

## Decision

Record continue, correct, narrow, suspend, or stop; named approvers; residual risks; CAPA links; affected capabilities; participant/customer notification; and next review date. A favorable pilot cannot override an unmet safety, legal, scientific, security, hardware, or production-readiness gate.
